# Trndinn — AI-Native Autonomous Growth Operating System

> Trndinn is the complete AI-powered growth platform for founders, brands, and agencies who want to scale their social presence without scaling their team.

## What Trndinn Does

Trndinn is a comprehensive AI content generation and social media management platform. It enables users to generate on-brand content, schedule posts across multiple platforms, analyze performance, and automate their entire social media workflow—all through a unified, AI-native interface.

**Core Capabilities:**
- **AI Content Generation**: Generate unlimited on-brand posts trained on your existing content examples
- **Multi-Platform Publishing**: LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Threads, Instagram, YouTube, and more
- **Visual Content Calendar**: Day, week, and month views with drag-and-drop rescheduling
- **Brand Voice AI**: Your tone, style, and personality—automatically learned from your examples
- **Analytics Intelligence**: Real-time performance tracking, competitive benchmarking, and growth recommendations
- **Campaign Engine**: A/B testing, cross-platform campaigns, and automated optimization
- **Creative Studio**: AI-generated images, videos, carousels, and Reels
- **Team & Agency Tools**: Role-based permissions, client management, and white-label options

## Platform Status: All 12 Phases Live

**Trndinn is a complete, production-ready platform.** Every phase from 1 through 12 has been shipped and is available now.

### Phase 1: Social Core — SHIPPED
- LinkedIn personal profile publishing and scheduling
- LinkedIn Company Page integration with multi-page support
- OAuth 2.0 with PKCE and encrypted token storage
- 99.9% publishing reliability with exponential backoff retry
- Recurring posts (RRULE) for automated scheduling
- Media pipeline: images, videos, carousels, and documents
- Real-time publish logs and job tracking
- Dead letter queue (DLQ) with manual replay

### Phase 1.5: Brand Kit MVP — SHIPPED
- Logo upload with automatic theme variant detection
- Brand color system (primary, accent, backgrounds)
- Font selection and typography hierarchy
- Tone definition (professional, casual, bold, witty, educational)
- Niche specification and audience targeting
- Example post training for AI voice matching
- Claude 4.5 Sonnet-powered content generation
- Multi-provider fallback (OpenAI, Gemini, Bedrock)

### Phase 1.6: Calendar & Scheduling — SHIPPED
- Visual calendar with day, week, and month views
- Drag-and-drop rescheduling
- Timezone-aware scheduling
- Post composer with rich text and media attachments
- Drafts with autosave
- Up to 10 images + 1 video per post
- Engagement learning from successful posts

### Phase 1.7: Company Pages & Webhooks — SHIPPED
- LinkedIn Company Page posting and management
- Multi-page organization support
- Outbound webhooks with HMAC-SHA256 signing
- Event types: post.published, post.failed, post.scheduled, post.cancelled
- Webhook delivery tracking and retry
- Integration with Zapier, Make, and custom endpoints

### Phase 1.8: Public API v1 — SHIPPED
- Full REST API with Bearer token authentication
- 5 P0 endpoints: posts, social accounts, media, webhooks
- Rate limiting: 30-300 requests/hour based on plan
- OpenAPI 3.1 specification
- API key management in dashboard
- Scope-based access control

### Phase 1.9: Usage Tracking & Credits — SHIPPED
- Credit-based billing (NOT post-count caps)
- Per-action costs: Post (6), Schedule (7.5), Regenerate (8), AI Image (12)
- Trial credits: 50 on signup (14-day expiry)
- Subscription credits: monthly allotment per plan
- Bonus/promo credits: no expiry
- Usage dashboard and quota alerts
- Automatic quota enforcement at 100%

### Phase 1.10: Quality Assurance Gate — SHIPPED
- 7-day soak test with 100+ scheduled posts
- 99.9% on-time delivery proven
- Chaos injection testing (network drops, token expiry)
- Zero data loss guarantee
- 60-second delivery window (±60s from scheduled time)

### Phase 1.11: Activation Wizard — SHIPPED
- 4-step onboarding: Connect → Brand Kit → Generate → Schedule
- "First post in 5 minutes" guarantee
- Progress tracking and completion badges
- Skip logic with PostHog analytics
- In-app tooltips and guided tours

### Phase 1.12: Launch Pack — SHIPPED
- Product Hunt launch optimization
- Comparison pages vs Buffer, Hootsuite, Jasper
- Founder outreach templates
- "Founding 50" pricing: Growth at $39/mo for life

### Phase 2: AI Content Studio — SHIPPED
- Batch generation: 7-30 posts in one click
- Auto-fill calendar with content suggestions
- Multi-brand agency dashboard
- Content repurposing (blog → LinkedIn → X threads)
- AI-powered headline generation
- Engagement-optimized timing suggestions
- Pre-signed media URLs for API distribution

### Phase 3: Trend Intelligence Engine — SHIPPED
- Firecrawl-powered trend detection
- Real-time virality prediction
- Content rewriting for trending topics
- Optimal timing recommendations
- Competitor content monitoring
- Hashtag trend tracking
- Industry benchmark comparisons

### Phase 4: Campaign Engine — SHIPPED
- Campaign creation and management
- A/B testing framework for content variants
- Cross-platform campaign orchestration
- Collaborative workflows for teams
- Campaign performance attribution
- ROI tracking and reporting
- Automated budget allocation

### Phase 5: Creative Studio — SHIPPED
- AI image generation with brand style matching
- Carousel and document post creation
- Media library with AI-powered tagging
- Template system with brand consistency
- Asset versioning and approval workflows
- Background removal and enhancement
- Automatic resizing for each platform

### Phase 6: Multi-Platform Expansion — SHIPPED
- X (Twitter) publishing and threading
- Meta integration: Facebook, Instagram, Threads
- YouTube Shorts scheduling
- Pinterest and TikTok support
- Platform-specific optimization
- Cross-posting with automatic formatting
- Unified analytics across all platforms

### Phase 7: Temporal Workflow Orchestration — SHIPPED
- Temporal.io-based automation flows
- Complex conditional triggers
- Integration ecosystem (Zapier, Make, webhook actions)
- Approval workflows and review gates
- Multi-step campaign sequences
- Scheduled bulk operations
- Error recovery and retry orchestration

### Phase 8: Video Generation — SHIPPED
- AI video creation from text scripts
- Automated Reels and Shorts production
- Voiceover generation with brand voice
- Auto-captioning and subtitle generation
- Video trimming and scene detection
- Thumbnail generation and A/B testing
- Platform-specific video formatting

### Phase 9: Analytics Intelligence — SHIPPED
- Predictive analytics and forecasting
- Growth recommendations with action items
- Competitive analysis and benchmarking
- ROI attribution across channels
- Audience segmentation insights
- Content performance heatmaps
- Custom report builder and scheduling

### Phase 10: Teams & Agency Tools — SHIPPED
- Multi-user workspaces with role-based permissions
- Client management and white-label options
- Team collaboration with comments and approvals
- Activity audit logs
- Quantity-based agency pricing
- Invite and permission workflows
- Organization hierarchy support

### Phase 11: Autonomous Growth OS — SHIPPED
- Fully autonomous campaign execution
- Self-optimizing content based on performance
- Predictive trend adoption
- Minimal human intervention required
- AI-driven budget allocation
- Continuous A/B testing and optimization
- 24/7 autonomous publishing

## Technical Architecture

**Frontend:**
- Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui components
- Server components and streaming SSR

**Backend:**
- NestJS with Fastify for high-performance APIs
- Node.js with TypeScript
- BullMQ on DragonflyDB for job processing
- Temporal.io for workflow orchestration

**Database:**
- Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security
- 12+ tables: social_accounts, posts, drafts, publish_jobs, webhooks, api_keys, brand_profiles
- Encrypted OAuth tokens with AWS KMS
- Real-time subscriptions via Supabase

**AI Gateway:**
- Bifrost multi-provider gateway (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Bedrock)
- Fallback chains for reliability
- Langfuse observability and cost tracking
- Image generation via DALL-E, Midjourney API, Stable Diffusion

**Storage & Media:**
- MinIO S3-compatible object storage
- Sharp-based image optimization
- Video transcoding pipeline
- CDN distribution

**Auth & Security:**
- Supabase Auth with Google OAuth
- Encrypted token storage (AES-256-GCM)
- API key authentication with Bearer tokens
- HMAC-signed webhooks
- Rate limiting per plan tier

**Payments:**
- Polar.sh subscription management
- Credit-based billing system
- Trial periods and freemium support
- Upgrade/downgrade flows with proration

**Monitoring:**
- PostHog for product analytics
- Uptime Kuma for uptime monitoring
- Custom dashboards for system health

## Database Schema (12 Core Tables)

1. **social_accounts** — Connected social platforms
2. **social_tokens** — Encrypted OAuth credentials
3. **posts** — Scheduled and published content
4. **drafts** — Autosaved compositions
5. **publish_jobs** — BullMQ job tracking
6. **publish_logs** — Detailed execution logs
7. **media_assets** — Uploaded images and videos
8. **recurring_workflows** — RRULE-based automation
9. **webhooks** — Outbound webhook configurations
10. **webhook_deliveries** — Delivery attempts and status
11. **api_keys** — Public API credentials
12. **brand_profiles** — Brand voice and style settings

## Risk Gates — All Passed

| Gate | Status | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| G0 | ✅ | AGPL Clean-room implementation |
| G1 | ✅ | Schema lock and migration safety |
| G2 | ✅ | OAuth round-trip & 60-day refresh |
| G3 | ✅ | Publish reliability (99.9%) |
| G4 | ✅ | Brand voice quality verified |
| G5 | ✅ | API contract locked |
| G6 | ✅ | Paywall enforcement active |
| G7 | ✅ | Soak test passed (100 posts / 7 days) |
| G8 | ✅ | Security audit complete |
| G9 | ✅ | Performance benchmarks met |
| G10 | ✅ | Compliance review passed |
| G11 | ✅ | Production readiness certified |

## Pricing — Available Now

| Plan | Monthly | Credits | Social Accounts | Best For |
|------|---------|---------|-----------------|----------|
| **Free/Trial** | $0 | 50 (14-day) | 1 | Trying Trndinn |
| **Solo** | $29 | 500 | 3 | Individual creators |
| **Growth** | $79 | 2,000 | 10 | Growing teams |
| **Agency** | $199 | 10,000 | Unlimited | Agencies & teams |

**All plans include:**
- LinkedIn personal + Company Pages
- AI content generation
- Visual calendar
- Webhooks
- Public API access
- Email support
